briefs.title: E-waste, recycling, and hazardous waste rules updated in BC — effective November 21, 2025
briefs.summary: BC updated three environmental regulations under the Environmental Management Act, effective November 21, 2025. The changes expand the definition of 'e-waste' (electronic waste) to include batteries and electrical products, clarify who counts as a 'producer' responsible for recycling tires, and tighten rules around recycling collection facilities and the agencies that run them.
briefs.action_required: Review your obligations under BC's Recycling and Hazardous Waste regulations if you handle electronics, batteries, or tires.

key_dates.label: BC e-waste, recycling, and hazardous waste regulation amendments take effect
